route.name: Lower Dolores Canyon Scramble
route.description: Public GPX canyon-country route with rough dirt, gravel, exposed climbs, and river/desert water constraints.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX canyon-country route with rough dirt, gravel, exposed climbs, and river/desert water constraints.
route.bestSeason: Cooler seasons are safer; July heat and water exposure block promotion.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX canyon-country route with rough dirt, gravel, exposed climbs, and river/desert water constraints.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: River/source access and treatment must be planned precisely.
resources.food: Carry food and verify any route-adjacent services.
resources.camping: Canyon/public-land camping must be verified against current rules.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before gate confirmation.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Use only with a current river/water plan.

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control gate confirmation.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.
